name: Auto Performance Optimizer
description: When FPS drops below 30, automatically invokes the Performance Optimizer playbook to diagnose and fix the bottleneck. Cooldown: 90s.
plan: Performance dropped below 30 FPS. Call triangle_performance_snapshot and triangle_describe_scene to understand the current bottleneck. Propose and apply the single highest-impact optimization (e.g. instancing, draw-call merging, LOD, material simplification, frustum culling). Then call triangle_performance_snapshot again to confirm the improvement. Summarise the before/after metrics.

successCriteria.description: FPS improvement of at least 10% after the optimization is applied.
